highlights:

# Director of AI Incubation job at HCA - Hospital Corporation of America in Nashville, TN
...
Director of AI Incubation
...
, United States
...
Experience the HCA Healthcare difference where colleagues are trusted, valued members of our healthcare team. Grow your career with an organization committed to delivering respectful, compassionate care, and where the unique and intrinsic worth of each individual is recognized. Submit your application for the opportunity below: Director of AI Incubation
...
We are seeking a visionary and forward-thinking Director of AI Incubation & Research to lead the exploration, experimentation, and advancement of next-generation AI capabilities across HCA. This role will spearhead early-stage innovation initiatives, evaluate emerging technologies, and incubate high-impact AI solutions with a strong emphasis on Agentic AI and advanced Generative AI systems.
...
As Director, you will define and drive the AI research and incubation strategy, identifying transformative opportunities that enhance clinical care, operational efficiency, and enterprise productivity. You will lead a multidisciplinary team of AI engineers to prototype, validate, and mature innovative AI concepts into scalable, enterprise-ready solutions.
...

experimentation and validation,

Education and Experience:
...
- Bachelor’s degree – Required
- Master’s degree – Preferred
- PhD in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Engineering, or a related technical field – Preferred
...
- Experience in healthcare, pharmaceutical, or other highly regulated industries, with demonstrated understanding of clinical, privacy, security, and compliance constraints impacting AI research and deployment.
...
- 7+ years of progressive experience in AI research, advanced analytics, machine learning, data science, or AI-driven product innovation, including leadership of multidisciplinary technical teams.
...
- Proven experience leading AI incubation or innovation initiatives, from early-stage research and rapid prototyping through validation, pilot deployment, and transition to scaled production teams.
...
- Strong technical foundation in AI/ML and Generative AI systems, including hands-on familiarity with model development, evaluation frameworks, Agentic AI architectures, and emerging research methodologies.
...
- Demonstrated ability to translate emerging AI research into practical, enterprise-ready capabilities, balancing experimentation with governance, scalability, and measurable impact.
...
- Deep expertise in responsible and ethical AI principles, including model risk management, bias mitigation, safety guardrails, transparency, privacy/security, and governance frameworks for AI agents.
...
- Experience designing and implementing experimentation frameworks, including benchmarking, evaluation metrics, hypothesis-driven research, and performance validation in real-world environments.
...
- Experience with cloud-based AI platforms and services (e.g. GCP, Azure).
- Experience with product management tools such as Jira, Confluence.
- Experience with tools and platforms used in citizen data science, automated analytics, and collaborative modeling environments
...
If you find this opportunity compelling, we encourage you to apply for our Director of AI Incubation opening. We promptly review all applications. Highly qualified candidates will be directly contacted by a member of our team. We are interviewing - apply today!

results.title: Senior Statistician | Jobflarely
highlights:
# Senior Statistician
...
At HCA Healthcare, our Digital Transformation and Innovation (DT&I) team is redefining what’s possible inpatient care. By leveraging the power of artificial intelligence, automation, and digital technologies, DT&I is helping drive meaningful improvements in clinical outcomes, reduce manual workload, and expand the reach of our care teams. If you're passionate about using technology to improve human life, this is where your work truly matters
...
The launch of the Digital Transformation & Innovation (DT&I) team marks a turning point for HCA Healthcare’s approach to change. Large-scale AI transformation solutions are being rapidly developed by cross-functional Agile pods and DT&I’s Value Tracking shared service drives change by bringing clinical, technical and financial value to light.
...
The Senior Statistician will support HCA Healthcare DT&I domain leaders by providing statistical analytics and reporting to identify opportunities and inform ongoing transformation initiatives. Responsibilities include consultation on research questions and the design of experiments, studies, data extraction, data modeling, statistical analysis and interpretation of results. The Senior Statistician must be able to take direction for tactically appropriate data and information models, identify opportunities and strategies in analyzing data, possess advanced analytical skills, intermediate SQL query skills, have excellent communication skills , have relationship building skills, portray a professional presence, and possess a proven track record of delivering high quality analytics results. The Senior Statistician must be able to take direction, work independently, and work in a small group collaboratively to deliver high level results within specified time frames.
...
- Develops actionable reports, report narratives, and data visualizations that identify areas of opportunity and help drive clinical quality at scale. Primary department platforms are Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, and PowerBI.
...
- Collaborates with research teams to design studies, perform sample size/power calculations and stratification/randomization of studies.
...
- Plans statistical design for research studies, conducts statistical analysis and reporting for these analyses.
...
- Leverages large datasets to build complex statistical models, programs and performs statistical testing. Primary statistical language is R.
...
- Delivers rapid turnaround analytics requests in support of hospital, division or group operations.
...
qualifications you will
...
- Bachelor's degree
...
Required
- Master's degree
...
Preferred
- 5+ years of relevant experience as a statistician - Required
- Advanced capabilities in statistical programming software (R - Preferred) - Required
...
- Advanced capabilities in reporting/BI Platforms: Required - Microsoft Excel, PowerBI - Required
...
- Intermediate capabilities in SQL – Required

results.title: Ravula A
highlights:
MLOps, ML Pipelines, RAG Systems | Vertex AI, SageMaker, Kubernetes
...
GenAI Engineer at [HCA Healthcare](https://www.linkedin.com/company/hca)
...
I build AI systems that survive contact with the real world. A lot of AI looks impressive in notebooks. My work starts where those demos usually break — production. I’m a Machine Learning & GenAI Engineer focused on turning ambiguous ideas into reliable, scalable, and trustworthy AI systems. Over the past few years, I’ve worked across traditional ML, LLMs, and full-stack engineering, delivering systems that don’t just generate outputs, but integrate cleanly, scale under load, and hold up with real users and real constraints. What that looks like in practice: → Designing LLM-driven systems (RAG, agentic workflows, conversational AI) that balance accuracy, latency, and cost → Building full-stack AI products where models, APIs, infrastructure, and UX are treated as one system → Taking ML from experiment → pipeline → deployment with MLOps that actually gets used → Running GenAI and ML workloads on GCP and AWS with strong attention to observability, security, and failure modes → Reducing hallucinations, tightening feedback loops, and making AI outputs predictable enough to trust I’ve worked on enterprise document intelligence, automation, analytics, and decision-support systems, especially in regulated environments where governance, reliability, and Responsible AI matter as much as model quality. I’m open to roles where AI is treated as engineering, not magic,especially teams building production-scale GenAI platforms, ML systems, or AI-powered products. Connect through:akhilaravula19@gmail.com |+1 (813) 60
...
### GenAI Engineer at [HCA Healthcare](https://www.linkedin.com/company/hca) (Current)
...
Designed and delivered a production-grade Generative AI platform on Google Cloud, enabling enterprise users to interact with large volumes of internal documents and structured data through real-time conversational AI. Built a full-stack GenAI application using React + TypeScript and FastAPI/Python, powered by Vertex AI (Gemini/PaLM) for document summarization, contextual Q&A, and analytics. Implemented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines with LangChain, Vertex AI Search, and Google Cloud Storage, allowing accurate, citation-aware responses across internal knowledge bases. Developed agentic AI workflows using function calling and tool orchestration to automate multi-step business tasks such as report generation, data retrieval, and form completion. Deployed the platform using Docker on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) with automated CI/CD pipelines, observability, and monitoring. Optimized inference performance to achieve 35% lower response latency and 28% reduction in hallucinations through prompt tuning, embedding optimization, and hybrid retrieval strategies. Ensured enterprise-grade security and Responsible AI compliance with IAM-based access control, secret management, audit logging, and content safety guardrails.
...

Hi, I'm Chetana. Curiosity about how intelligence can be transformed into practical technology led me into the world of AI. Today, my work revolves around Generative AI, Machine Learning, and building solutions that simplify complex business processes and improve the way people interact with information. My professional journey has centered around bridging advanced AI capabilities with real-world business needs. From enterprise knowledge assistants and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems to predictive analytics, document intelligence, fraud detection, and cloud-native AI platforms, my focus has always been on creating solutions that move beyond experimentation and generate measurable value. 🚀 𝗔𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘀 𝗼𝗳 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗲 Large Language Models (LLMs), Generative AI, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI Agents, Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, MLOps, LLMOps, Semantic Search, Vector Databases, Predictive Analytics, and Enterprise AI Deployment. 🛠️ 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗶𝗲𝘀 & 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝘀 OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, Python, SQL, PySpark, MLflow, FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, Azure Machine Learning, AWS SageMaker, Azure, AWS, and GCP. 🌍 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘆 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 Throughout my career, I have collaborated with cross-functional teams to modernize information access, streamline decision making processes, strengthen fraud and risk analysis capabilities, and unlock insights from large scale enterprise data. My experience spans highly regulated industries where scalability, security, explainability, and reliability are critical requirements. The most rewarding part of my work is seeing AI transition from concept to adoption where intelligent systems become trusted tools that help teams work faster, make better decisions, and solve complex business challenges. Open to opportunities in 𝐆𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐀𝐈 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐀𝐈/𝐌𝐋 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐋𝐋𝐌 𝐄𝐧𝐠𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠, 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐈, 𝐌𝐚𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠, and 𝐄𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐞 𝐀𝐈 𝐒𝐨𝐥𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬. 📩 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗮𝗰𝘁 Email: chethana.at.work@gmail.com Phone: +1 (716) 325-0273

...
- ​ Designed a HIPAA-aligned RAG knowledge base over 8M+ clinical notes and policy documents using LlamaIndex for hierarchical chunking, open-source BGE-M3 embeddings (self-hosted on GPU) for PHI isolation, and Pinecone namespaces per facility; achieved recall@10 of 0.91 and lifted answer faithfulness from 78% to 93%.
...
- ​ Optimized inference latency and throughput for self-hosted clinical models (including the fine-tuned Llama-3) by migrating serving infrastructure to vLLM; leveraged PagedAttention and continuous batching to increase token generation throughput by 3.5x, slash p90 time-to-first-token (TTFT) by 60%, and reduce monthly compute costs by approx $22K.
...
- ​ Engineered a document-parsing pipeline for scanned lab reports and insurance forms using Tesseract OCR with layout-aware post-processing and LLM-based field extraction, automating ingestion of approx 22K documents/day at 96.4% field accuracy and eliminating approx 5 FTEs of manual data entry.
...
- ​ Fine-tuned Llama-3-8B with LoRA (QLoRA, 4-bit) on 180K de-identified discharge summaries for clinical note generation, achieving 94% summarization accuracy and ROUGE-L of 0.62, within 2 points of GPT-4o at approx1/20th the inference cost for high-volume batch workloads.
...
- ​ Implemented production guardrails (NeMo Guardrails + custom PHI/PII redaction and hallucination classifiers) and an MCP server exposing Epic EHR tools to agents under RBAC, blocking 100% of test-set PHI leakage attempts and cutting unsafe completions from 3.1% to 0.2%.

results.title: GOKULAKRISHNA Boominathan Surianarayanan
highlights:
AI/ML Engineer | Generative & Agentic AI | Data Scientist | LLMs, RAG (LangChain, Pinecone, Claude 3, GPT-4) | Python, TensorFlow | MLOps/LLMOps | Cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP | Finance & Healthcare (HIPAA/PCI/SEC)
...
Gen AI engineer at [HCA Healthcare](https://www.linkedin.com/company/hca)
...
### Gen AI engineer at [HCA Healthcare](https://www.linkedin.com/company/hca) (Current)
...
Built and deployed enterprise-scale Generative AI, Machine Learning, and NLP solutions for healthcare analytics and clinical document intelligence. Developed LLM-powered applications using LangChain, LangGraph, HuggingFace Transformers, and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines with vector embeddings and ChromaDB to enable semantic search, knowledge retrieval, and AI assistants for enterprise data platforms. Designed scalable AI/ML architecture on Google Cloud Platform and AWS, leveraging Vertex AI, BigQuery, Cloud Storage, SageMaker, and S3 to support distributed model training, real-time inference, and hybrid cloud analytics. Built data ingestion and feature engineering pipelines using PySpark, Pandas, and Spark SQL on Dataproc and EMR to process large-scale structured and unstructured healthcare datasets. Developed deep learning and predictive models using PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn, applying techniques such as Transformer-based NLP, Named Entity Recognition (NER), text classification, and sequence modeling to extract insights from large medical text corpora. Optimized model performance through hyperparameter tuning, cross-validation, and feature engineering to improve prediction accuracy and inference performance. Implemented MLOps pipelines and cloud-native microservices using Docker, Kubernetes (GKE/EKS), FastAPI, and Flask, enabling scalable API-based ML inference services. Automated deployments using CI/CD pipelines, Terraform, and GitLab, while monitoring model and infrastructure performance through Prometheus, Grafana, and Cloud Monitoring.

Utilized OpenAI’s GPT-4 and Meta’s LLaMA 2 models, which are cutting-edge in natural language understanding and generation. • Replaced traditional vector storage with FAISS for fast, accurate retrieval and embedding of large datasets, ensuring optimal performance in high-query environments. • Integrated Hugging Face’s transformers for fine-tuning LLMs using Falcon-40B and Mistral models, further improving response quality and accuracy. • Implemented LangChain for efficient document retrieval workflows, enabling seamless interaction with vast knowledge bases and ensuring robust performance in handling complex, multi-turn dialogues. project I have

field of LLMs and RAG : Medical R
...
This application creates a vector store from a high quality document for medical symptoms and diagnosis and analyzes multiline text provided by the user to give an assessment. The key feature is the usage of Jina AI embedding model available on hugging face which can support a large 8192 sequence length and Google's genai pro model as the LLM model for retrieval and augmentation (RAG). Leveraging the JINA embedding model provides a scalable and customizable solution for embedding and searching large datasets and opting for the open source Google Gemini Pro LLM (Large Language Model) offers a cost-effective alternative to paid models while still delivering impressive language generation capabilities.

results.title: Danny Xia
highlights:
Data Modeler at HCA Healthcare | M.S. in Data Science (UCSD) | Expertise in Python, SQL, & ML/AI
...
I build the data foundations that power the future of healthcare. Throughout my career, from designing convolutional neural networks for surgical robotics to delivering enterprise data solutions for consulting clients, my focus has been on translating complex information into clinical and operational intelligence. Currently, as a Data Modeler at HCA Healthcare, I bridge the gap between business requirements and high performance technical solutions. I specialize in designing scalable data architectures and logical structures within the Google Cloud ecosystem, specifically optimizing schemas for BigQuery. By integrating diverse data streams from Electronic Medical Records and ensuring alignment with HL7 standards, I help create the robust frameworks necessary for sophisticated clinical analytics and improved patient outcomes. With an M.S. in Data Science from UC San Diego and a background in Statistics from UC Berkeley, I bring a rigorous analytical lens to the way data is structured, governed, and utilized across the enterprise. I am particularly passionate about the intersection of data architecture and machine learning. I believe that the most sophisticated AI is only as effective as the underlying data model, and I am dedicated to refining those foundations to solve real world problems in the healthcare space.

MBA in Data Analytics | Engineering Scalable Solutions with Business Impact Early in my career, I built a full-stack data analytics platform for recycling plants—what started as a static table evolved into a dynamic visualization system, earning recognition as a finalist for the Recycling Machinery Innovation of the Year (Plastics Recycling Awards Europe 2024). That experience showed me that data isn’t just about collection—it’s about identifying what truly matters and making it actionable. Now, working with data at scale in healthcare, I see firsthand how real-time signals improve patient outcomes. This MBA sharpens my ability to bridge engineering, analytics, and business strategy to drive impact. With years of hands-on experience, I pursued this program to strengthen my leadership and ensure the solutions I build aren’t just cutting-edge—they’re scalable, responsible, and built to define the future of enterprise innovation.
...
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | Southern Illinois University, Carbondale While balancing an 18-hour course load, I applied my technical skills through internships and on-campus roles. At Amdocs, I developed email analytics tools using NLP and ML models, identifying communication bottlenecks and building real-time dashboards with Tableau and PySpark. Simultaneously, as a student developer at SIUC Systems, I improved legacy software, migrated infrastructure, and contributed to a meta-data processor for graduate research archives. In addition, I worked on a proof of concept (PoC) for a Twitter sentiment analysis platform using Apache Kafka, Python ML models, and Plotly-Dash. The project explored how first responders could use social media data to identify relevant disaster-related information in real time. These experiences gave me hands-on expertise in software development, data engineering, and scalable problem-solving—skills I continue to refine in my career.

results.title: Principal Data Scientist - Generative AI, Machine Learning, Python, R - Remote | Wfh
highlights:
Principal Data Scientist - Generative AI, Machine Learning, Python, R - Remote | Wfh
...
# Principal Data Scientist - Generative AI, Machine Learning, Python, R - Remote
...
Responsible for overseeing data science projects, managing and mentoring a team, and aligning data initiatives with business goals. Lead the development and implementation of data models, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and stay updated on industry trends. Ensure ethical data use and communicate complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders. Lead initiatives on model governance and model ops to align with regulatory and security requirements. This role requires technical expertise, strategic thinking, and leadership to drive data-driven decision-making within the organization and be the pioneer on generative AI healthcare solutions, aimed at revolutionizing healthcare operations as well as enhancing member experience.
...
- Research and Development: Stay current with the latest advancements in AI and machine learning and apply these insights to improve existing models and develop new methodologies.
...
- AI Model Deployment, Monitoring & Model Governance: Deploy AI models into production environments, monitor their performance, and adjust as necessary to maintain accuracy and effectiveness and meet all governance and regulatory requirements.
...
- Innovation Projects: Lead pilot projects to test and implement new AI technologies within the organization
...
- Machine Learning Model Development: Design, develop, and train machine learning models using a variety of algorithms and techniques, including supervised and unsupervised learning, deep learning, and reinforcement learning.
...
- Agentic Workflows Implementation: Develop and implement agentic workflows that utilize AI agents for autonomous task execution, enhancing operational efficiency and decision-making capabilities.
...
- RAG Pattern Utilization: Employ retrieval-augmented generation patterns to improve the performance of language models, ensuring they can access and utilize external knowledge effectively to enhance their outputs.
...
Fine-Tuning: Fine-tune pre-trained models to adapt them to specific tasks or datasets, ensuring optimal performance and relevance in various applications.
...
- Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams, including software engineers, product managers, and business analysts, to integrate AI solutions into existing systems and processes.
...
- Partner closely with business and other technology teams to build ML models which helps in improving Star ratings, reduce care gap and other business objectives.
...
Master's Degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related field
...
- 10+ years' work experience as a data scientist preferably in healthcare environment but candidates with suitable experience in other industries will be considered
...
- Technical Proficiency: Strong programming skills in languages such as Python and R, and experience with machine learning frameworks like TensorFlow, Keras, or PyTorch.
...
- Statistical Analysis: Excellent understanding of statistical methods and machine learning algorithms, including k-NN, Naive Bayes, SVM, and neural networks.
...
- Experience with Agentic Workflows: Familiarity with designing and implementing agentic workflows that leverage AI agents for autonomous operations.
...
- RAG Techniques: Knowledge of retrieval-augmented generation techniques and their application in enhancing AI model outputs.
...
- Model Fine-Tuning Expertise: Proven experience in fine-tuning models for specific tasks, ensuring they meet the required performance metrics.
...
PREFERRED EDUCATION:
...
PHD or additional experience
...
- PREFERRED EXPERIENCE:
- Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., Databricks, Snowflake, Azure AI Studio etc.) for working with AI workflows and deploying models.
- Familiarity with natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision techniques.
